---
title: "Revealjs Comic"
subtitle: "Custom RevealJS Format"
author: "Mickaël Canouil"
date: today
format:
  revealjs-comic-revealjs: default
---

## Introduction

This presentation demonstrates the revealjs-comic RevealJS format.

The format applies custom styling and configuration.

## Features

The format provides:

- Custom colour theme.
- Typography adjustments.
- Layout modifications.

## Code Highlighting

```javascript
// JavaScript code is syntax highlighted
function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}
```

## Lists

::: {.incremental}
- First point.
- Second point.
- Third point.
:::

## Two Columns

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
Left column content.
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
Right column content.
:::
::::

## Speaker Notes

Press 'S' to open speaker view.

::: {.notes}
These are speaker notes that only the presenter can see.
:::

## Conclusion

The revealjs-comic format provides a customised RevealJS presentation.

Questions?
